jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.content:
Acme is hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build distributed Python services on Kubernetes. You will own services backed by PostgreSQL and Redis, design high-throughput APIs with FastAPI, and contribute to our observability stack (OpenTelemetry).

  • 5+ years building production backend systems
  • Strong Python; Go a plus
  • Comfortable with distributed systems and on-call rotations

jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer, Platform
jobs.content: The Platform team is hiring a Staff Engineer. We run on Kubernetes, Python, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and a Celery task queue. You'll lead architecture for our agent orchestration framework (LangGraph), mentor senior engineers, and own platform reliability.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.content: We are hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead our React + Next.js dashboard work. Strong TypeScript, Tailwind, and accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) background required.
